description:
As a state influenza coordinator, use the ILINet data in 'Documents/flu_data_2019_2020.csv' to establish an epidemic threshold and visualize the 2019-2020 season. Calculate the alert threshold (Mean + 2 Standard Deviations) using 'Total_ILI' data from the baseline period (Weeks 40-50 of 2019). Generate a line chart plotting 'Total_ILI' and the 'Threshold' by 'Week', and save it to 'Documents/control_chart.png'. Document the calculated threshold and the list of weeks where 'Total_ILI' exceeded that threshold in 'Documents/alert_report.txt' using the following format:
Threshold: <numeric_value>
Alert Weeks: <comma_separated_list>
